allow: PowerShell($gh = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($gh\) { Write-Output "gh found: $\($gh.Source\)"; gh auth status } else { Write-Output "gh NOT installed" })

PowerShell($w = Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($w\) { Write-Output "winget: $\($w.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "winget NOT available" }; $c = Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Write-Output "choco: $\($c.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "choco NOT available" }; $s = Get-Command scoop -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($s\) { Write-Output "scoop: $\($s.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "scoop NOT available" })

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Links\\gh.exe"\); $found = $null; foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { $found = $p; break } }; if \($found\) { Write-Output "gh path: $found"; & $found --version | Select-Object -First 1; Write-Output "--- auth status ---"; & $found auth status 2>&1 } else { Write-Output "gh.exe not found in expected locations"; Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source })

Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" pr create --repo AbroadUmedaShota/SPPED-AD-TEST --base main --head tutorial-single-flow-exit --title "feat: チュートリアル出口をアカウント作成CTAの単一フローに統一" --body-file "C:/Users/user/AppData/Local/Temp/pr-body-tutorial-single-flow.md")

PowerShell(try { $j = Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 '05_support\\assets\\data\\news.json' | ConvertFrom-Json; $withImg = $j.items | Where-Object { $_.image }; Write-Output \("JSON OK / items: " + $j.items.Count + " / with image: " + \($withImg | Measure-Object\).Count\); $withImg | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \("  " + $_.url + " -> " + $_.image\) } } catch { Write-Output \("JSON ERROR: " + $_.Exception.Message\) })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765,8766 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "killed pid $_" } catch { "no pid $_" } }; "done")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8769 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; "done")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8770 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; "done")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8777 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; "done")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count)

PowerShell(try { $j = Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 '.claude\\settings.local.json' | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output \("OK / allow entries: " + $j.permissions.allow.Count\) } catch { Write-Output \("JSON ERROR: " + $_.Exception.Message\) })

PowerShell(try { $c = Get-Clipboard -Raw -ErrorAction Stop; if \($c\) { "CLIP_LEN=" + $c.Length; "CLIP_PREVIEW_FIRST20=" + $c.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(20,$c.Length\)\) } else { "CLIP_EMPTY" } } catch { "CLIP_ERR: $_" })
